claim_text: Eight overt-object predicate/sense combinations have exact source support, but the evidence does not establish a free productive verb class.
limitation: Only 睇 and 食 have multiple documented object profiles in this packet.

claim_text: A closed action-verb boolean is not an adequate progressive-compatibility model.
evidence_scope: objectless motion/state-like examples plus explicit situation-type/selection discussion
limitation: Does not itself provide a complete replacement classifier.

claim_text: Cantonese nominal expressions are head-final and allow preceding classifier/determiner and possessor material.
limitation: Does not uniquely bracket every 啲 A 嘅 N string.

claim_text: 啲 di1 functions as a plural classifier in Cantonese nominal expressions.
limitation: No exact analysis of 啲 + possessor + 嘅 + head attachment.

claim_text: 啲九巴嘅數據 is attested in context, but the transcript does not prove a unique constituent bracketing.
evidence_scope: transcript lines 1460–1462 and surrounding KMB-data discussion
limitation: Interpreted speech and no prosodic record in the PDF.

claim_text: R2’s categorical claim that 啲公司嘅報告 must be 啲 [公司嘅報告] is not established.
evidence_scope: two independently licensed component structures and ambiguous surface order
limitation: Native/prosodic testing may refine reading preferences.

claim_text: Overt 同埋 coordinates XPs, including nominal phrases.
limitation: Does not settle every 同/同埋 register or ambiguity condition.

claim_text: 問緊錫條同埋錫線 naturally instantiates a progressive predicate with an overt coordinated nominal object.
limitation: One token; no exact audio-linked 錫條 pronunciation.
